---
title: "Maude Yonge"
---

## Maude Yonge

**Dates:** (d. 3 Nov 1938)

**Maiden name:** (Woods)

### Description

niece-in-law of CMY

### Biography

Daughter of Lt-Col Woods of Llandaff, Glamorgan, she married (1899) Maurice Edward Yonge.  Her address was Lincolns, Boyatt Lane, Eastleigh, her estate was £157  and probate was granted to Maurice Yonge [will]

### Letters

- Letter from April 11 [1900]
- Letter from March 30th [1900]
- Letter from Feb 3 1900
- [To Christabel Rose Coleridge, Aug 12 [1899]](../letters/3416_To_Christabel_Rose_Coleridge.html)
- [To Mary Yonge, Jan 26th [1899]](../letters/3393_To_Mary_Yonge.html)

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
